allow: Bash(gh pr create --base main --title 'feat: bootstrap Supabase \(schema v2 + seed + OAuth + CI/CD\)' --body ' *)

PowerShell($env:Path -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'GitHub|gh' }; \(Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Name; Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe")
